source_policy: Wowhead TBC guide pages are canonical for rankings and context; Wowhead TBC item/spell pages are canonical for acquisition data; reviewed overrides are applied last.
snapshot_policy: Commit normalized JSON snapshots from data/raw/wowhead; do not commit full HTML cache files.
conflict_policy: Item and spell pages win for acquisition details. Guide source cells are retained as evidence and used only when item-page data is missing.
registry_notes: Gear BiS coverage is registered explicitly for every class/spec/phase unit. Shared Wowhead guide URLs are repeated when one guide backs multiple addon specs.
Item, spell, gem, enchant, consumable, and leveling acquisition pages are discovered from registered guide snapshots and audited after snapshots exist.
